user.title: Media Art Wrapper — Player
user.description: Select the media player to wrap and choose how its content should be categorised.

data_description.source_entity_id: The media player entity whose artwork will be resolved.
data_description.display_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant. Leave blank to use the player name.
data_description.category: Determines which artwork providers are used. Choose Auto to try all providers.

artwork.title: Media Art Wrapper — Artwork
artwork.description: Configure the artwork image dimensions, fallback behaviour, and optional API keys.

data.fallback_mode: Fallback when no artwork is found

data_description.ratio: Preset dimensions for the artwork image. Choose Custom to enter exact pixel values.
data_description.artwork_width: Only used when Custom is selected above.
data_description.artwork_height: Only used when Custom is selected above.
data_description.fallback_mode: What to show when no artwork can be found for the current track.
data_description.fallback_custom_url: Full URL to an image shown when no artwork is found. Only used when Custom URL is selected above.
data_description.tmdb_api_key: Required for The Movie Database streaming artwork. Leave blank to skip.
data_description.igdb_client_id: Twitch developer app Client ID, required for IGDB game cover art.
data_description.igdb_client_secret: Twitch developer app Client Secret, required for IGDB game cover art.
data_description.steamgriddb_api_key: Optional. Enables high-quality community game art from SteamGridDB. Steam Store artwork works without a key.
data_description.fanart_api_key: Optional. Enables TV show logos and posters from Fanart.tv.
data_description.xmltv_url: Optional XMLTV EPG feed for advanced channel programme matching. Not yet implemented (planned for v3.1).
data_description.epg_sensor: Sensor der HA-EPG Integration. MAW liest daraus den aktuell laufenden Titel und sucht dessen Artwork.

combined.title: Media Art Wrapper — Combined Player
combined.description: Optionally create a virtual combined player that aggregates multiple media players.

data_description.create_combined: When enabled, creates a virtual media_player entity and a cover image entity aggregating the sources below.
data_description.combined_name: Used to name the entities: media_player.NAME and image.NAME_cover. Use lowercase letters and underscores only.
data_description.auto_priority: Gaming hat höchste Priorität, dann Streaming, TV, Musik, Auto.
data_description.combined_source_1: Priority ordered: PLAYING or BUFFERING beats PAUSED or IDLE, which beats ON. Lower slot number wins within the same tier.
data_description.combined_audio_sources: Entitäten die Lautstärke, Shuffle und Wiedergabebefehle empfangen. Falls leer, werden Befehle an die aktive Anzeigeentität gesendet.
data_description.combined_delegate_1: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_2: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_3: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_4: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_5: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_6: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_7: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.
data_description.combined_delegate_8: Falls gesetzt, werden Browse, Queue und Steuerungsbefehle an diese Entität weitergeleitet. Nützlich z.B. für Music Assistant bei HomePods oder native PS5-Steuerung.

abort.already_configured: This media player is already configured.

init.title: Media Art Wrapper — Player
init.description: Update the category and display name for this media player.

errors.combined_name_required: A name is required when the combined player is enabled.
